title: CandidateArtifact
description: Schema for a CandidateArtifact — the evaluated candidate output. App-owned Apply Gate decides acceptance; this artifact does not.

candidate_artifact_id.description: Unique identifier for this candidate artifact

modelworkpacket_ref.description: Reference to the ModelWorkPacket that produced this artifact

candidate_dna_ref.description: Reference to the CandidateDNA lineage record for this artifact

artifact_family_ref.description: Reference to the artifact family type

output_contract_ref.description: Reference to the output contract this artifact must satisfy

content_hash.description: Hash of the candidate content for integrity reference

evidence_refs.description: References to evidence supporting this artifact

final_gate_status.description: Final gate advisory status — not app acceptance

claim_boundary.description: Claim boundary — what this artifact does and does not prove

candidate_only.description: Must be true — artifact is candidate only until app accepts

non_claims.description: Explicit list of things this artifact does not claim or prove
